judgment.summary: High-growth business with strong gross margins and cash flow, offset by net losses and a high valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS of 1.65 beat the 1.47 estimate by 12.1%, with the next earnings date on 2026-05-28.
positives: Gross margin 71.7% — high level of core product profitability.
Free cash flow $463.32M — healthy cash generation despite net losses.
Total cash $2.39B vs total debt $62.83M — extremely strong liquidity position.
negatives: Profit margin -2.9% — company is currently operating at a net loss.
Forward P/E 42.79x — valuation is high relative to earnings.
Quarterly earnings growth -1.9% — recent deceleration in earnings growth.
Debt/Equity 2.13 — indicates a leveraged capital structure.

news.paragraph: MongoDB is seeing positive momentum from its new AI data platform capabilities and an expansion in Ireland, which has led Citi to initiate a positive catalyst watch and raise its target price. While some recent reports note falling shares and a lack of near-term estimate upside, technical assessments remain bullish for the intermediate term. Traders should monitor the impact of these AI-driven developments on upcoming performance.
